title: Deep Learning Foundations
shortSummary: Build intuition for neural nets, training loops, optimization, and the practical shape of modern deep learning systems.
whyItMatters: Even if you spend most of your time shipping with foundation models, deep learning fluency helps you understand model behavior, papers, and systems tradeoffs more clearly.
coreConcepts: Training loops, loss curves, and debugging
Where deep learning foundations still show up in frontier roles
